title: The Impact of Generative AI on Information Processing
subtitle: Evidence from the ban of ChatGPT in Italy - Bertomeu, Lin, Liu, and Ni (2025)

slides.title: The Impact of Generative AI on Information Processing
slides.subtitle: Evidence from the ban of ChatGPT in Italy

cards.title: Generative AI as processing capital
cards.text: ChatGPT may reduce the cost of reading, summarizing, translating, and organizing information.

cards.title: Analysts are measurable intermediaries
cards.text: Reports, forecast frequency, and forecast accuracy reveal how information production changes.

cards.title: Markets reveal spillovers
cards.text: Earnings reactions and bid-ask spreads test whether reduced processing affects price discovery.

items.title: ChatGPT released
items.desc: The tool diffuses rapidly into information work.

items.title: Pre-ban baseline
items.desc: Analyst reports and forecasts establish comparison behavior.

items.title: Italy ban
items.desc: Italian IP addresses are blocked from ChatGPT.

items.title: Restoration
items.desc: Dynamic tests examine reversal after access returns.

slides.title: Empirical Design
rows: Absorb fundamentals and stable coverage traits
Tech major; ex-ante AI text probability

slides.title: AI-Use Footprint Falls During the Ban
Analyst Output Effects
rows: About 21% of sample SD fewer forecasts
Foreign analysts do not take up the slack
More reliance on industry or macro content

slides.title: Difference-in-Differences Logic
slides.formula: Y = beta1 * Italy Analyst x Ban + controls + fixed effects + error

lines.english: Outcome such as text score, forecast count, accuracy, or bid-ask spread.
One for analysts located in Italy.
One during the ChatGPT ban period.
Treatment effect of reduced ChatGPT access.

steps.title: Access removed
steps.subtitle: Italy ban
steps.desc: Domestic analysts lose easy ChatGPT access.

slides.title: Market-Level Findings
rows: Italy x Ban x UE = 0.829*** for day 0
Smaller effects with high analyst, foreign, or institutional ownership
Alternative information channels cushion the shock

slides.title: Caveats and Boundary Conditions
limitations: VPN workarounds mean treatment is incomplete
The ban lasted less than one month
Alternative AI tools could attenuate effects
futureWork: Test retail investor information processing more directly

items.text: Generative AI appears to matter for professional information processing.
The analyst evidence links AI access to information quantity and quality.
The market evidence suggests reduced processing can weaken informational efficiency.
